claim_text: This result is surprising considering the importance of distribution shifts in learned feature representations in the transfer learning literature.37,38 While we surmise that any learned convolutional filters, independent of the training data domain, may be used as high-dimensional feature extractors for estimating image quality, further theoretical work is required to understand these empirical findings.
